framework.name: Principal-Agent Problem Escalates in Agent Chains
framework.description: Paper acknowledges that in agent economies where agents delegate on behalf of other agents with 'unknown objectives,' the principal-agent problem compounds. Each hop adds alignment uncertainty. But offers no concrete solution — just flags the problem.
framework.raw_quote: AI agents may act on behalf of different human users, groups and organizations, or as delegates on behalf of other agents, with associated unknown objectives
